role_summary: Orchestrates the generation of structured, domain-focused documentation by aggregating repository introspection data and granular extraction notes, translating technical observations into technology-agnostic narratives using large language models.
finding: The system establishes a canonical documentation framework centered on eight core domain areas: DDD modeling, intent and problem space, solution capabilities, dependency mapping, integration flows, cross-cutting concerns, entity structures, and hard specifications. It implements strict synthesis rules to guarantee technology independence, factual accuracy by prohibiting content fabrication, and behavioral clarity through Given/When/Then formatting, ensuring the output serves as a coherent, user-facing domain artifact derived from multi-level code analysis.
